name: Ginger Beef
recipeIngredient: 6 each Thin slices fresh ginger, cut julienne
2 each Green onions, cut Chinese style
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the meat in wine, soy sauce, and sugar for 15 minutes.
2. Heat a wok and add the oil.
3. Fry the garlic and ginger for one minute. Remove them from the pan, reserving the oil.
4. Cook the beef on one side for one minute.
5. Add the reserved ginger and garlic to the pan.
6. Add oyster sauce, chicken broth, and green onions. Stir fry for a moment.
7. Stir in beaten eggs and cook until just set, allowing the mixture to thicken.
